title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: Google fixed two new actively exploited flaws in the Chrome
entity: Google fixed two new actively exploited flaws in the Chrome

sections.executive_summary: This report covers Google fixed two new actively exploited flaws in the Chrome  — a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P1_CRITICAL. CISA KEV confirms active exploitation. Affected sectors: Chrome.
sections.technical_analysis:
Threat: Google fixed two new actively exploited flaws in the Chrome browser
Risk Score: 10.0/10 | Exploitability: 7.5/10
Attack Vectors: Client — Exploitation for Client Execution; Execution — Command and Scripting Interpreter; Technique T1486
Impact: CATASTROPHIC — Complete system compromise likely
Attack Chain: Execution (T1203,T1059) → Impact (T1486)
⚠ CISA KEV: Confirmed active exploitation — federal patch mandate active
ASSESSMENT: CRITICAL — Immediate defensive action required. Activate IR procedures.
mitigation_guidance: Apply vendor patches for Google fixed two new actively exploited flaws in the Chrome

platform: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v37.0 — AI THREAT ANALYST
